column4: How to use (make a copy first, under Share/export on mobile, or File on PC!):
Input BoS level, lifetime relics and desired percentage of lifetime relics that should go to BoS
Input the number of owned artifacts plus the number of enchanted artifacts.
Required BoS level will give what BoS should be with current lifetime relics
Pump to this level will give required BoS level to catch up, assuming you only put relics in BoS and have no relics left
Current percentage will give the current percentage of lifetime relics in BoS
It doesn't matter which format you input:
